india_trends.title: Tata Capital Q4 Results: Cons PAT soars 43% YoY to Rs 1,502 crore, revenue rises 9%
india_trends.summary: Tata Capital Q4 Results Tata Capital announced a significant 43% year-on-year increase in its consolidated net profit for the March quarter of 2026, reaching Rs 1,502 crore. This growth was supported by a 9% rise in revenue from operations, which stood at Rs 8,160 crore. The company's board also rec

india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: Jio Financial among 7 big movers on Thursday
india_trends.summary: Indian markets closed lower for a second straight session, with Sensex and Nifty falling over 1%. Selling pressure in IT, auto and financial stocks weighed on indices. Union Bank, Havells declined, while OFSS, Fractal Analytics and Jio Financial Services emerged as key gainers.

india_trends.title: Tata Capital Q4 Results: Profit jumps 47% YoY to ₹1,466 crore; first-ever dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Tata Capital said that its bottom line stood at ₹1,466.27 crore during the quarter under review, as against ₹999.81 crore in the same period last year. Meanwhile, on a quarter-on-quarter (QoQ) basis, the figure was higher by 15.93%.

india_trends.title: Infosys Q4 Results: Cons profit jumps 21% YoY to Rs 8,501 cr, revenue rises 13%; Rs 25/share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Infosys Q4 Results: ​​The revenue form operation in Q4FY26 stood at Rs 46,402 crore, up 13.4% compared to Rs 40,925 crore.

india_trends.title: Adani Energy Q4 Results: Cons profit rises 6% YoY to Rs 684 crore; revenue up 17%
india_trends.summary: Adani Energy Q4 Results: Adani Energy's revenue from operations in the reporting period increased 17% YoY to Rs 7,443 crore.

india_trends.title: FM Nirmala Sitharaman meets heads of banks on AI risks following concerns over Anthropic's Mythos
india_trends.summary: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman convened a meeting with bank heads to address Artificial Intelligence (AI) risks, particularly concerning Anthropic's Mythos model and its potential to compromise financial system data security. Banks have been urged to implement preemptive measures to safeguard t

india_trends.title: Adani Energy Q4 Results: Net profit rises 5.7% YoY to ₹684 crore; revenue up 16.8%
india_trends.summary: Adani Energy Solutions reported a 5.7% increase in Q4FY26 net profit to ₹684 crore, up from ₹647 crore last year. Revenue rose 16.8% YoY to ₹7,443 crore, indicating sustained business growth.

india_trends.title: Infosys Q4 Results: Board declares final dividend of ₹25 per share. Details here
india_trends.summary: Infosys, the country’s second-largest software company, announced a final dividend of ₹25 per share for FY26, along with its March quarter performance.

india_trends.title: Infosys Q4 results: Profit jumps 21% YoY to ₹8,501 crore
india_trends.summary: Infosys Q4 results: India's second-largest IT company in terms of market capitalisation, Infosys, on Thursday, 23 April, reported a 21% year-on-year (YoY) rise in consolidated profit at ₹8,501 crore.

india_trends.title: L&T bags contract from Oberoi Realty to construct 7 residential towers in Gurugram
india_trends.summary: Larsen & Toubro (L&T) on Thursday said it has bagged a contract from Oberoi Realty for the construction of seven high-rise residential towers in Gurugram.

india_trends.title: Sunteck Realty Q4 pre-sales rise 22% YoY to Rs 1,064 crore
india_trends.summary: Sunteck Realty has reported a 22 per cent increase in sales bookings to Rs 1,064 crore for the quarter ended March.

india_trends.title: Nifty, Sensex Wilt Further Over Stalemate in Gulf; Broader Market Outperforms - Thursday Market Report - Moneylife
india_trends.summary: Nifty, Sensex Wilt Further Over Stalemate in Gulf; Broader Market Outperforms - Thursday Market Report    Moneylife

india_trends.title: Havells India ends FY26 on a weak note; will FY27 be any better?
india_trends.summary: Havells India capped off a weak FY26 with a 6% dip in Q4 Ebitda, driven by persistent losses in its Lloyd appliance division and rising input costs. Despite strong demand for industrial cables, analysts are trimming EPS estimates as the company faces a steep climb toward margin recovery in FY27.

india_trends.title: Nippon Life's India asset manager to settle Yes Bank investment case, document shows
india_trends.summary: Nippon Life India Asset Management will pay over 96 crore rupees to settle SEBI charges. The company allegedly invested customer funds in high-risk Yes Bank bonds. This investment led to significant investor losses when Yes Bank became insolvent. A large portion of the settlement will be returned to

india_trends.title: Tips Music reports 32% revenue growth, 93% jump in PAT in Q4 FY26
india_trends.summary: TIPS Music Limited (formerly Tips Industries Limited), one of India's leading publicly listed music labels, announced its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, delivering strong growth across key financial metrics.

india_trends.title: India weighs petitions on mandate for domestic solar cells
india_trends.summary: India's clean energy ministry is reviewing petitions from solar manufacturers and developers regarding a new mandate for domestically made solar cells. This rule, set to take effect in June, could lead to a significant shortage, increased prices, and project delays due to insufficient local producti

india_trends.title: Stock Market Highlights: Sensex, Nifty close in the red amid firm trend in crude oil prices
india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty, Share Prices Update: Sensex closed 852 points or 1.09 per cent lower at 77,664, while the Nifty ended at 24,173,down 205 points or 0.84 per cent lower

india_trends.title: Lumio eyes Series A round after $4 million seed funding
india_trends.summary: Lumio, a new home entertainment firm, plans to raise more funds. The company, started by ex-Xiaomi and Flipkart staff, already secured $4 million. Lumio aims to grow its range of premium televisions. It targets a growing market segment. The firm is also navigating supply chain challenges.

world_trends.title: Amex cardholders are loading up on luxury goods and premium airfares, as spending growth picks up
world_trends.summary: American Express books 10% spending growth in the first quarter.

world_trends.title: Honeywell’s stock drops as sales miss confirms fears of Middle East shipping disruptions
world_trends.summary: Honeywell’s sales missed expectations for a third straight quarter, as the Middle East conflict resulted in shipping disruptions.
